title: phyllanthus lathyroides var. genuinus
intro: Phyllanthus lathyroides var. genuinus is a variant of the Phyllanthus lathyroides plant, also known as Bhumyamalaki in Sanskrit, which is a type of herb belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus lathyroides var. genuinus include its ability to support liver health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders, and can be consumed as a supplement or used topically in the form of creams and ointments.
